_comment: Worked example for a typical canvas-based viewer that renders one page per <canvas>, navigated by 'Prev'/'Next' buttons, with a 'Page X of Y' indicator. The viewer can show a transient black frame mid-render, so blankMax stays below 1.0 to skip unrendered frames. When a portal exposes several documents in a picker, open each one and use --multi to name and capture them in turn.
